channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-05-28 — NORMAL · Gold: COST
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▼ 0.1% · VIX 16.5

VIX chilling at 16.

🥇 Gold Pick: COST — Score: 49/100 (B)

📡 171 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Let go and let the market do what it's going to do. Your job is to manage YOUR side of the trade." — Sam
